wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|The Chosen Cheese|2}}
{{R|The Chosen Cheese||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|Room Full of Cheese|2}} event. At the end of each combat, it gives 1 Max HP.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from the {{E|Room Full of Cheese|2}} event by selecting the {{Frame|Search}} option and losing 14 HP.
